title: Host networking [wip, do not merge yet]
body:
Allow for the user to specify network=host|bridge.  If network
is not specified, the default will be bridge.  While "none" is now
a valid option, it is not included in this.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: I think we should merge this and log that --network=none doesnt work yet.  WDYT @rhatdan @mheon  ... upside is host communications will work.
I'm fine with getting this in for net=host and getting net=none working next

:pushpin: Commit 8e4209a has been approved by `rhatdan`
